items.claim: LLM可作为统一数据生成器，仅需一个格式化示例即可批量生成训练数据
items.span: unified data creation pipeline that requires only a single formatting example

items.claim: 生成数据训练的模型在OOD任务上最高超越人类标注数据17.5%
items.span: by up to 17.5% on out-of-distribution evaluation

items.claim: 不需要领域内无标注样本，也不需要标签语义化prompt
items.span: does not need in-domain unlabeled examples or data-specific label-descriptive prompts

items.claim: 生成策略组合（如目标语言demonstration + LLM self-revision）可将合成数据与真实数据的差距缩小到5%以内
items.span: narrowing the gap with real data to as little as 5% in some settings
items.drift_note: claim声称'生成策略组合'，但原文只提到'smart prompting techniques'，未明确说组合策略；且5%是'某些场景'的结果，claim未标注限定条件

items.claim: 巧妙prompt技巧可减少对更大LLM的依赖，使小模型也能高效生成合成数据
items.span: smart prompting techniques can reduce the advantage of larger LLMs, highlighting efficient generation strategies

items.claim: Airbnb使用LLM生成合成查询和标签，解决搜索冷启动问题，实现冷启动到温启动的转变
items.span: framework for generating synthetic queries and labels using LLMs, powering model training for Airbnb search

items.claim: 种子引导方法Query KL散度0.66 vs真实用户，InPars基线为12.03（7.5倍改进）
items.span: our seed-guided approach achieves 0.66 KL divergence vs real users, a 7.5x improvement over InPars baseline

items.claim: Virtual Judge (VJ) labeling实现更广泛的标签覆盖
items.span: Virtual Judge (VJ) labeling for broader coverage

items.claim: 迭代式自引用生成（self-referential）通过采样新生成的样本作为下一轮prompt seed实现多样化
items.span: iteratively samples from the pool of newly created examples to seed the prompt for the next round of generation

items.claim: 4种自引用策略（Random/Contrastive/Similar/Tree）实现有控多样化
items.span: 4 distinct instantiations of self-reference including random, contrastive, similar, and tree sampling

items.claim: 合成数据训练的评估集比无种子基线更具区分度（79% vs 97%配对准确率）
items.span: 79% vs 97% pairwise accuracy - harder evaluation examples

items.claim: 结合对比listing pairs与种子查询，平衡真实感与多样性
items.span: combine contrastive listing pairs from booking sessions with seed queries to balance realism and diversity

items.claim: 跨越11种类型多样化的低资源语言，包括极低资源语言，评估3个NLP任务和4个开源LLM
items.span: across 11 typologically diverse languages, including several extremely low-resource ones, using 3 NLP tasks and 4 open-source LLMs

items.claim: 标签空间空洞（yes/no等无语义标签）场景同样适用该pipeline
items.span: tasks with semantically void label spaces

items.claim: demonstration、label-based summaries、self-revision等生成策略的比较研究尚缺乏
items.span: a comparison of various generation strategies for low-resource language settings is lacking
